creator: frank@exit.com
text:
The libapreq port hasn't built for a while.  This brings the port
	to the author's latest version and fixes the build problem.  I've
	also pointed the MASTER_SITE at the author's entry on www.cpan.org,
	since this version isn't yet in the modules list, and I've split
	the patches into one per patched file.

How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
